user.title: Connect to imbrr
user.description: Enter the email address and password you use to sign in at www.imbrr.com. Credentials are stored by Home Assistant and only ever sent to imbrr.

select_devices.title: Select devices
select_devices.description: Choose which imbrr devices to add to Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate imbrr
reauth_confirm.description: The password for {email} no longer works. Enter the current password.

error.no_devices: No imbrr devices were found on this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This imbrr account is already configured.

init.title: imbrr options
init.description: Polling and real-time options. The backfill window is only used the first time the integration is set up.

data.fast_polling_enabled: Poll faster while water is flowing
data.backfill_days: History backfill window (days, first setup only)

error.invalid_timezone: Unknown timezone name. Use an IANA name like America/New_York.
